calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(name=[$0], address=[$1], id=[$7], age=[$8])
    LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(IS NULL($1), =($0, 'david'))])
      CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_nested_simple]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..15=[{inputs}], expr#16=[IS NULL($t1)], expr#17=['david':VARCHAR], expr#18=[=($t0, $t17)], expr#19=[AND($t16, $t18)], proj#0..1=[{exprs}], id=[$t7], age=[$t8], $condition=[$t19])
    CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_nested_simple]])
